metadata.title: Were You There?
metadata.subtitle: African American Passion spiritual, publ. 1899
metadata.lyricist: Traditional African American spiritual, first published in *Old Plantation Hymns* by William Eleazar Barton (1899)
metadata.x_pd_basis: Anonymous African American spiritual published 1899, the first spiritual included in an official hymnal of a major American denomination (Episcopal Hymnal, 1940). PD by > 125 years
